examples: Verne Wisby, 68, suffers from chronic obstructive pulmonary disease, a lung disease linked to smoking that can cause respiratory infections and breathing trouble.
"She gave me hope, encouragement, and support, " says Mr. Wisby.
Ms. Sevrence worked with him to quit smoking within 30 days, and instructed Mr. Wisby and his wife Bonnie in the use of oxygen and medications to avoid flare-ups in his lungs.
